fields.name: Package Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the package that the filter belongs to.

fields.name: Table ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the table on which you want to filter records in the configuration table.

fields.name: Field ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the field on which you want to filter records in the configuration table.

fields.name: Field Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the field on which you want to filter records in the configuration table.

fields.name: Field Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the field caption of the field on which you want to filter records in the configuration table.

fields.name: Field Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the field filter value for a configuration package filter. By setting a value, you specify that only records with that value are included in the configuration package.
